\section*{WORK EXPERIENCE}

\experienceheader{Software Engineer Intern}{Traveloka · Jakarta (WFO)}{Backend Engineering \& Data Automation}{Aug 2025 -- Apr 2026}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*, itemsep=1pt, topsep=1pt]
    \item Built automated flight-booking reschedule pipeline processing \textbf{1,000+ daily transactions} at \textbf{99.9\% accuracy}, reducing manual intervention by \textbf{85\%} via configurable scrapers and intelligent failover logic
    \item Engineered real-time data-sync services and structured-logging pipelines feeding \textbf{BigQuery} analytics dashboards, enabling data-driven operational decisions at scale
    \item Developed secure Credential Management System with AES-GCM encryption, automated rotation, and granular audit logging on MongoDB
    \item Enhanced CI/CD pipelines with Karate automated API testing and auto-rollback logic; leveraged GitHub Copilot CLI to accelerate development velocity and code quality
\end{itemize}

\vspace{2pt}

\experienceheader{Full Stack Developer Intern}{PT Magna Solusi Indonesia · Jakarta (Hybrid)}{Enterprise Application Development}{Jan 2025 -- Jun 2025}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*, itemsep=1pt, topsep=1pt]
    \item Optimised PostgreSQL database through query tuning, indexing, and stored procedures, cutting average response time by \textbf{35\%} for high-volume data workflows
    \item Designed RESTful APIs in a microservice architecture handling \textbf{10,000+ daily requests} at sub-200 ms latency; deployed via Docker and Kubernetes
    \item Delivered full-stack enterprise modules (Spring Boot + Angular) with seamless frontend-backend integration across production environments
\end{itemize}
